name: stackra/transfer
purpose: Unified import/export engine on maatwebsite/excel — XferJob + XferShard + XferArtifact + XferMappingProfile aggregates with queued sharded execution and error artifacts.
capabilities: XferShard (xshd_ prefix) — sub-job for sharded runs
XferArtifact (xart_ prefix) — file output + signed URLs
Four import modes: append / upsert / replace / delete
Preview + dry-run pipeline plus per-user completion notifications
when_to_use: A tenant needs bulk import or export of any registered entity with queued execution, error artifacts, and mapping profiles.
when_not_to_use: For real-time single-row create/update, use the entity's own Actions surface. For streaming exports, prefer the notifications + storage seams.
